raw_consumer_statement:
I booked a hotel room using my CITI Premier Credit Card and finally the stay was not good and finally the merchant refunded me. But CITI did not give me or post that refund after XXXX business days. Nor they gave any ways to solve it in the XXXX calls I made to Citi. 
More Background info : Before the merchant refunded me, I was trying to submit a dispute to get my money back because the stay was horrible. The merchant then contacted me, apologized and persuaded me to solve it offline. I agreed and withdrew my dispute, and then the merchant refunded me. 

Date of the original transaction : XX/XX/year> Amount : {$230.00} ARN is : XXXX
